svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: OpenSpec governance · Superpowers execution · single traceable change from idea to TDD-verified code

g.text: Explore context · ask clarifying questions one at a time · propose 2–3 approaches with trade-offs
Change boundary: why · what changes · capabilities · impact
Architecture & rationale: context · goals · decisions · risks · trade-offs
Delta requirements: ADDED · MODIFIED · REMOVED · RENAMED · SHALL/MUST + scenarios
2–5 min TDD micro-steps (RED → GREEN → REFACTOR) · file paths · snippets · commit points
Isolated .worktrees/<name>/ · new branch · clean test baseline
Main agent dispatches a fresh subagent per micro-task in plan.md · writes apply.md receipt
RED → GREEN → REFACTOR · failing test first · minimum code to pass
Per-task subagent review · final review over the full implementation · - [ ] → - [x]
5 verification checks → recorded in verify.md (requires apply.md)
Task completion — every - [ ] in tasks.md is now - [x]
Delta spec sync — changes/<name>/specs/ synced into openspec/specs/
Coherence — design decisions ↔ spec requirements still consistent (warning, non-blocking)
Implementation signal — no unstaged files in the worktree
4 options · merge locally · push & create PR · keep as-is · discard · worktree cleanup per outcome
→ outputs finalize.md · Outcome · Final state · PR URL · Cleanup
Apply deltas to openspec/specs/ · order: RENAMED → REMOVED → MODIFIED → ADDED
git-agnostic · does not merge branches · canonical golden path: archive runs before PR merge

svg.text: Superspec · OpenSpec orchestrates · Superpowers executes · See docs/workflow-details.md for the 10-step expansion
